cells.rationale: Security-critical invariant work: a bounded proof window that must never arm silently or survive restart without becoming a backdoor activation, touching the credential-observer contract and the activation gate across three source files — a nameable subtle-correctness/security gate that overrides the GPT-first default.

Small, bounded work whose payload is user-facing warning wording, ordered install docs, and an ADR amendment — judgment-and-taste on phrasing rather than intelligence-bound, so sonnet at the bounded-single-surface band fits.
